home.process_subtitle: Systems thinking • Predictable delivery • Measurable leverage
home.process_step1_desc: Map your current workflows, identify bottlenecks, and understand where manual processes are limiting scale.
home.process_step2_desc: Determine which automations will yield the highest operational ROI and prioritize the build accordingly.
home.process_step3_desc: Build the system with clean architecture, proper testing, and integration with your existing tools and data.
home.process_step4_desc: Deploy to production, train your team, monitor performance, and iterate based on actual usage data.
home.trust_title: From Operating a Platform to Building Systems for Others
home.trust_text: I ran a live digital platform trusted by thousands. Handled payments, disputes, abuse, support, and uptime at scale. That experience taught me what systems thinking actually means under real operational pressure. I apply that same judgment to businesses needing automation, financial clarity, and leverage.

home.terminal_subtitle: Navigate my work through the command line
home.github_subtitle: Consistent commits • Active development • Always learning

services.title: Business Systems Engineering
services.subtitle: Software that automates operations, clarifies finances, and creates operational leverage
services.callout: Revenue-generating businesses with operational complexity • Operators scaling past manual processes • Companies needing financial visibility and automated workflows
services.card1_desc: I design, build, and operate cohesive systems (mobile + web + backend) with one owner—no handoffs or silos.
services.card1_f1: One operator across mobile, web, and API
services.card1_f2: Launch ready: design, build, deploy, support
services.card1_f3: Measured on stability, shipping speed, and adoption
services.card2_desc: Replace manual workflows with durable automation across ops, fulfillment, customer comms, and finance.
services.card2_f2: Connect existing tools, handle edge cases
services.card2_f3: Monitor, measure, and iterate after launch
services.card3_desc: Unify payments, subscriptions, cards, and accounting into one view with dispute flows and reconciliations handled.
services.card3_f2: Dispute automation, refunds, edge cases covered
services.card4_desc: Unify payments, cards, and cash into a single view. Automated reconciliation, dispute flows, and executive dashboards.
services.card4_f3: Dispute automation + finance close in days
services.card5_desc: Architecture, ops workflows, KPI design, and roadmaps. Straight talk on build vs. buy and sequencing for ROI.
services.card6_desc: iOS + web + API built as one system. Single owner for design, engineering, infra, and launch.
services.card6_f2: CI/CD, monitoring, and support baked in
services.pricing_subtitle: Clear starting points • Fixed quotes after discovery • No surprises
services.pricing1_desc: Native iOS app with core features, backend integration, and App Store launch. Fixed quote after discovery.
services.pricing2_desc: Full-stack web app with frontend + API + database. Production ready, fixed quote after discovery.
services.pricing3_desc: iOS app + web platform + backend + automation. One owner, fixed quote after discovery.
services.pricing_note: All projects include discovery, fixed-price quote, and post-launch support.
services.pricing_note_cta: Need a custom quote? Get in touch
services.faq_subtitle: Everything you need to know • Quick answers to common questions
services.faq1_a: I use Swift/SwiftUI for iOS, React/Node for web, Postgres or live databases for backend, and AWS/Cloudflare for infra. I pick durable tools that fit the business, not trends.
services.faq2_a: I scope workflows with you, then provide a fixed quote—no hourly billing. Anchors start at $15k for iOS MVPs and $20k for web platforms; final price comes after discovery.
services.faq3_a: Yes. Every project includes 30–90 days of post-launch support depending on scope. After that I offer retainers for iteration, monitoring, and optimization.
services.faq4_q: Can you integrate with existing systems?
services.faq4_a: Yes. Most builds connect to existing tools, databases, and third-party services. API integrations, webhooks, and data migrations are standard.
services.faq5_a: Map workflows and bottlenecks, design the system, build in weekly increments with demos, deploy, train, then monitor and iterate on real usage.
services.faq6_a: Revenue-generating businesses with operational complexity: high-volume digital platforms, SMBs scaling past manual processes, and teams needing financial visibility and automation.
services.faq7_q: Do you take hobby or idea-stage projects?
services.faq7_a: I focus on operators with real workflows and revenue. If you're pre-revenue or hobby-stage, I'm not the right fit.

portfolio.title: Systems I've Built & Operated
portfolio.subtitle: Products and platforms I've shipped and run in production
portfolio.metalworth_primary: Real time precious metals tracking with live portfolio management.
portfolio.metalworth_status: Live on the App Store across iOS and watchOS with production users.
portfolio.metalworth_role_value: Designed, built, and operated end to end
portfolio.metalworth_built_value: Native iOS and watchOS using Swift and SwiftUI with live CloudKit data and external pricing feeds
portfolio.metalworth_data_value: Integrated with Kitco for reliable real time precious metals pricing
portfolio.ios_primary: Finance, productivity, and decision support applications.
portfolio.ios_status: Full ownership from concept through development and App Store release.
portfolio.ios_focus_value: Stable architecture, live data, and long term maintainability
portfolio.ios_stack_value: Swift, SwiftUI, UIKit, CloudKit, Core Data, REST APIs
portfolio.draftory_primary: Professional contract generation and e-signature platform. From blank page to signed contract in minutes.
portfolio.draftory_status: Live at draftory.ca with web app and native iOS app.
portfolio.draftory_what_value: Generates 8 contract types with built-in e-signatures, cryptographic audit trails, and law-firm quality PDF output
portfolio.draftory_built_value: React, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, Express, SQLite, Stripe, Cloudflare Pages, Railway
portfolio.draftory_security_value: AES-256-GCM encryption, HMAC-SHA256 signatures, passkeys, TOTP 2FA, JWT auth
portfolio.skyroa_primary: Regulated escrow platform for digital goods. Secure conditional payments protecting both buyers and sellers.
portfolio.skyroa_status: Live at skyroa.com. Canadian FMSB application in progress.
portfolio.skyroa_what_value: Escrow protection with KYC identity verification, dispute resolution, real-time messaging, and FINTRAC-aligned compliance
portfolio.skyroa_built_value: NestJS, PostgreSQL, Prisma, Redis, Stripe, Plaid, React monorepo, Cloudflare Workers
portfolio.skyroa_arch_value: Double-entry ledger, tiered KYC system, state-machine trade flow, WebSocket real-time updates
portfolio.frostynow_primary: Smart window control system. IoT device management from iPhone with scheduling, timers, and voice control.
portfolio.frostynow_status: Native iOS app with real-time WebSocket backend on Railway.
portfolio.frostynow_what_value: Controls smart frost windows via iPhone — scheduling, bulk control, push notifications, Siri Shortcuts, HomeKit bridge
portfolio.frostynow_built_value: Swift, SwiftUI, Socket.IO, AppIntents, HomeKit, APNs, JWT auth with Face ID
portfolio.frostynow_design_value: iOS 26 Liquid Glass design system, floating snowflake particles, haptic feedback, VoiceOver accessible
portfolio.internal_primary: Internal systems built to automate operations and track business activity.
portfolio.internal_status: Built for my own products and platforms.
portfolio.internal_focus_value: Automation, live data visibility, and systems designed to scale without manual work
portfolio.internal_stack_value: Swift based services, live databases, internal dashboards, and supporting web tools
portfolio.trust_line: Everything shown here was built, shipped, and operated in production.

about.title: Operator who builds systems under real constraints.
about.subtitle: I built and operated a 7 figure digital platform with 2,500+ members. Handled payments, disputes, support, abuse, and uptime. I apply that systems thinking to businesses through KCOH Software Inc.
about.card1_desc: Operated a live platform at scale. Built iOS apps that shipped to the App Store. Automated workflows, payment systems, and support operations. Learned what breaks under pressure and what holds.
about.card1_item1: Owned operations from code to support
about.card1_item2: Handled real money flows and disputes
about.card1_item3: Built systems that replaced manual work
about.card2_desc: Clear scoping. Fixed quotes after discovery. Weekly progress with actual working software. No surprises. No fluff. Focus on what creates leverage for your business.
about.card3_desc: Track record of operating real systems. Judgment earned under actual constraints. Direct access to someone who has solved the problems you are facing now.
